title: Mothers of Men

actors: Claire Whitney, Lumsden Hare, Martha Mansfield
plot: Young Austrian girl Marie Helmar, is left penniless by the death of her father and disgraced by Prussian officer Captain Von Pfaffen, she flees to the safety of her French cousins, the De La Mottes. There she falls in love with th...
